chunks.text: Industrial and Public Relations Staff - EECS at Berkeley Industrial and Public Relations Staff External Relations Group (XRG) XRG is the EECS department’s primary interface with the general public. They manage the Corporate Access Program (CAP)–which offers first tier access to our graduating students for institutions who donate to the department annually; alumni relations ; the EECS Joint Colloquium ; the Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS); the External Advisory Board (EAB); and all public relations matters. Industrial & Public Relations Contacts public-relations@eecs.berkeley.edu Public relations, media, and general questions. gifts@eecs.berkeley.edu Gifts and donations to the department. news@eecs.berkeley.edu Report news about faculty, students, alumni, and staff to include on the EECS home page (awards, media features, milestones, etc.) alumni-relations@eecs.berkeley.edu bears-admin@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about the Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) colloquium@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about the EECS Joint Colloquium. cap-admin@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about the Corporate Access Programs (CAP). eab-admin@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about the External Advisory Board (EAB).
